# EcoSynTech Local Core - PR Template

## Summary
- What changed and why? Brief description of the goal and impact.

## Changes
- List of modified files and key behavior changes.
- Any new features or fixes relevant to dashboards, API, or tests.

## Testing
- How did you verify the changes? Include commands run and results.
- Any manual tests performed (dashboard routes, API endpoints, etc.).
- Mention if you ran the dashboard-endpoints tests and full test suite.

## Risks
- Any potential risks or breaking changes introduced by this PR.

## Documentation
- Any docs updated or needed for future reference.
